expectations.evidence: Step 1 uses limit=1 for RHEL 8 host count. Step 2 uses limit=1 to get CVE count from meta.total_items=23.
Chains inventory__list_hosts -> vulnerability__get_cves (count) -> vulnerability__get_cves (top 5) -> vulnerability__get_cve (details x5).
All args use correct JSON types throughout.
All vulnerability calls include known_exploit: true.
User-facing response uses domain terms. No tool names exposed.
Top 5 presented in a table with CVE ID, CVSS, Affected Systems, Remediation, Advisory columns plus detailed descriptions below.
Explicit: 'All of these have active exploits in the wild, so they warrant urgent attention.'
